Review.title: Product Review
Review.description: An authentic purchase testimonial recorded by a customer

productSlug.description: Identifier for the specific shoe/product model

initials.description: Initials or name of the reviewer

desc.description: Narrative detailing the customer's purchase experience

orderNo.description: Identifier for the verified purchase of 1 Pair

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was registered

reviews/{reviewId}.description: Global list of all customer reviews across products
